title: Classes of shares; fractional shares
doc_html:
PART V.  SHARES

§51.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

Acts 1968, No. 105, §1; Acts 1987, No. 62, §2, eff. June 11, 1987; Acts 1988, No. 173, §2, eff. June 29, 1988; Acts 1988, No. 455, §1, eff. July 10, 1988; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.

PART V.  SHARES
§51.  Repealed by Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
Acts 1968, No. 105, §1; Acts 1987, No. 62, §2, eff. June 11, 1987; Acts 1988, No. 173, §2, eff. June 29, 1988; Acts 1988, No. 455, §1, eff. July 10, 1988; Acts 2014, No. 328, §5, eff. Jan. 1, 2015.
